## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Adventures Group and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance metrics, and upcoming tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/6ZUoQtt_X4Dz1LBWCCkfb9t6tr5FnWzN?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance metrics show promising results, with some articles achieving 14% CTR (vs 3% benchmark)](https://fathom.video/share/6ZUoQtt_X4Dz1LBWCCkfb9t6tr5FnWzN?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Revenue tracking from blog content needs refinement; will use analytics data as a directional indicator for now](https://fathom.video/share/6ZUoQtt_X4Dz1LBWCCkfb9t6tr5FnWzN?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Team to implement scalable banner system using Sanity CMS components for easier management](https://fathom.video/share/6ZUoQtt_X4Dz1LBWCCkfb9t6tr5FnWzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)
  - [Monthly deep-dive meetings planned to review revenue goals and overall content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/6ZUoQtt_X4Dz1LBWCCkfb9t6tr5FnWzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Metrics

  - [Search Console data shows strong performance for some articles (14% CTR vs 3% benchmark)](https://fathom.video/share/6ZUoQtt_X4Dz1LBWCCkfb9t6tr5FnWzN?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Team tracking clicks, impressions, and CTR for GrowthX-created content](https://fathom.video/share/6ZUoQtt_X4Dz1LBWCCkfb9t6tr5FnWzN?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Some keywords (e.g., "things to do in Puerto Vallarta in March") outperforming expected search volume](https://fathom.video/share/6ZUoQtt_X4Dz1LBWCCkfb9t6tr5FnWzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Agreement to monitor overall trends: 20% increase in impressions/clicks should correlate with 20% revenue growth](https://fathom.video/share/6ZUoQtt_X4Dz1LBWCCkfb9t6tr5FnWzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

### Revenue Tracking Challenges

  - [Current analytics data has some discrepancies but useful for identifying trends](https://fathom.video/share/6ZUoQtt_X4Dz1LBWCCkfb9t6tr5FnWzN?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [Difficult to attribute revenue to specific articles due to complex user journeys](https://fathom.video/share/6ZUoQtt_X4Dz1LBWCCkfb9t6tr5FnWzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)
  - [Plan: Track overall metrics (impressions, clicks, revenue) monthly rather than per-article attribution](https://fathom.video/share/6ZUoQtt_X4Dz1LBWCCkfb9t6tr5FnWzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)
  - [Google Analytics shifting to data-driven attribution model by default on April 3rd](https://fathom.video/share/6ZUoQtt_X4Dz1LBWCCkfb9t6tr5FnWzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

### Banner Implementation Strategy

  - [Team to create a scalable banner system using Sanity CMS components](https://fathom.video/share/6ZUoQtt_X4Dz1LBWCCkfb9t6tr5FnWzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)
  - [Banners will be grouped by blog post categories (e.g., adventures, sea lovers)](https://fathom.video/share/6ZUoQtt_X4Dz1LBWCCkfb9t6tr5FnWzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Implementation will allow for easy updates without editing individual posts](https://fathom.video/share/6ZUoQtt_X4Dz1LBWCCkfb9t6tr5FnWzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1231.0)
  - [Initial test: Add banners to top 10 articles across the website](https://fathom.video/share/6ZUoQtt_X4Dz1LBWCCkfb9t6tr5FnWzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1647.0)

### Keyword Cannibalization Concerns

  - [Team to analyze if blog posts are outranking tour pages for key terms](https://fathom.video/share/6ZUoQtt_X4Dz1LBWCCkfb9t6tr5FnWzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1690.0)
  - [Mariana to review tour pages, identify main keywords, and suggest optimizations](https://fathom.video/share/6ZUoQtt_X4Dz1LBWCCkfb9t6tr5FnWzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1749.0)
  - [Isabel suggested checking Search Console for top traffic-driving keywords and their corresponding ranking pages](https://fathom.video/share/6ZUoQtt_X4Dz1LBWCCkfb9t6tr5FnWzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1837.0)

### Content Review and Publishing Status

  - [Several articles awaiting review:](https://fathom.video/share/6ZUoQtt_X4Dz1LBWCCkfb9t6tr5FnWzN?tab=summary&timestamp=2053.0)
      - [Best Cancun beaches for every type of traveler](https://fathom.video/share/6ZUoQtt_X4Dz1LBWCCkfb9t6tr5FnWzN?tab=summary&timestamp=2073.0)
      - [Best Puerto Vallarta beaches](https://fathom.video/share/6ZUoQtt_X4Dz1LBWCCkfb9t6tr5FnWzN?tab=summary&timestamp=2008.0)
      - [Mexico vacation destinations](https://fathom.video/share/6ZUoQtt_X4Dz1LBWCCkfb9t6tr5FnWzN?tab=summary&timestamp=2053.0)
  - [Team members assigned specific articles for review](https://fathom.video/share/6ZUoQtt_X4Dz1LBWCCkfb9t6tr5FnWzN?tab=summary&timestamp=2093.0)
  - [Mariana to revise "drinking age in Mexico" article based on feedback](https://fathom.video/share/6ZUoQtt_X4Dz1LBWCCkfb9t6tr5FnWzN?tab=summary&timestamp=2105.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Isabel to discuss banner component implementation with development team](https://fathom.video/share/6ZUoQtt_X4Dz1LBWCCkfb9t6tr5FnWzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1275.0)
  - [Mariana to prepare monthly revenue goal and content strategy review meeting](https://fathom.video/share/6ZUoQtt_X4Dz1LBWCCkfb9t6tr5FnWzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)
  - [Team to review and publish pending articles ASAP](https://fathom.video/share/6ZUoQtt_X4Dz1LBWCCkfb9t6tr5FnWzN?tab=summary&timestamp=2124.0)
  - [Mariana to analyze tour pages for keyword optimization opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/6ZUoQtt_X4Dz1LBWCCkfb9t6tr5FnWzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1749.0)
  - [Implement and test banner system on top 10 articles across the website](https://fathom.video/share/6ZUoQtt_X4Dz1LBWCCkfb9t6tr5FnWzN?tab=summary&timestamp=1647.0)
